clarity_of_intent.description: Can the system clearly identify what is being asked?
indicators_present: Clear action verb at the start or early in prompt
indicators_missing: Vague opening with no clear task

context_completeness.description: Does the prompt provide who, what, constraints, and desired output?
indicators_missing: No indication of what a good answer looks like

specificity.description: Does the prompt constrain the solution space appropriately for the task?
indicators_missing: Scope is open-ended when it should not be

output_specification.description: Does the prompt tell the system what a good response looks like?

extraction.description: Pulling structured data from unstructured text

null_handling.description: Instructions for missing or ambiguous values

extraction.ceiling_note: Extraction prompts can reach 100% with complete schema and null handling.

reasoning.description: Analyzing situations, evaluating options, explaining decisions
examples: How does FMLA apply to this employee?

situation_detail.description: Specific facts of the situation provided

constraints_stated.description: Applicable rules, policies, or limits mentioned

reasoning.ceiling_note: Reasoning prompts rarely reach 100% because domain context only the user has cannot be inferred.

generation.description: Drafting content, writing documents, creating communications
examples: Write an email to a client
generation.ceiling_note: Generation prompts can reach high scores but tone and audience are often missing.

ideation.description: Brainstorming, exploring options, generating creative solutions

constraints_for_feasibility.description: Budget, timeline, or technical constraints provided

evaluation_criteria.description: How ideas should be evaluated stated

ideation.ceiling_note: Ideation prompts should not be over-specified. Over-constraint penalizes score.

examples: How do I handle this situation?
What should I do about this employee?

role_context.description: User role and experience level stated

desired_depth.description: How detailed or simple the answer should be

conversational.ceiling_note: Conversational prompts depend heavily on user-supplied context. System can scaffold but not invent facts.
